title: ASR Tactical Ninja Shoe Foot Spike Claws Attachment Adjustable
description:
Ready to scale walls like a ninja? Then these stainless steel foot claws are a good place to start. Modeled after traditional ninja climbing tools, these spikes are designed to be worn on your feet to give you a better grip. Simply tie them over your shoes or feet and you are ready to ascend. One size fits all. These claws are even useful for walking on ice or other slick surfaces. In a pinch you could even use them to defend yourself from other ninjas. Just be careful as the spikes are quite sharp.

ASR Tactical Ninja Shoe Foot Spike Claws Attachment Adjustable
Ready to scale walls like a ninja? Then these stainless steel foot claws are a good place to start. Modeled after traditional ninja climbing tools, these spikes are designed to be worn on your feet to give you a better grip. Simply tie them over your shoes or feet and you are ready to ascend. One size fits all.

These claws are even useful for walking on ice or other slick surfaces. In a pinch you could even use them to defend yourself from other ninjas. Just be careful as the spikes are quite sharp.
Key Features
  • NINJA SHOE ATTACHMENT: Spiked climbing foot straps for scaling walls or trees
  • HEAVY DUTY: Made from stainless steel for tactical use in sticky situations
  • ADJUSTABLE: These one-size-fits-most foot spikes are adjustable and tie on securely over shoes
  • NINJA TACTICAL: Inspired by traditional ninja tools but recreated for modern tactical use
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Material: Stainless steel; Color: Black; Size: 4.5" x 1.5"
